public_reputation: Wagon-guard and field defender who is better known by granary families than by any lord.
appearance: Bright-plumed road gear, polished fittings, and visible attention to presentation mark the role before the voice does.
manner: Moves like someone trained to decide quickly once the threshold for action has been crossed. In Zootia, that reads as someone practical, supply-aware, and season-conscious, attentive to material reliability over display, and the habits of a warrior still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of warrior in and around Zootia floodplain circuits, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Zootia floodplain circuits workable through the obligations of warrior while managing the immediate pressure of institutional scrutiny in Zootia.
hidden_pressure: Must balance deterrence, morale, and actual capability while others often judge only the visible surface. Around Zootia floodplain circuits, that usually means carrying institutional scrutiny, reputation risk, daily strain without letting the role of warrior visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Hal Wenner will trade useful tactical knowledge if the party solves a security problem too sensitive for ordinary channels.
Hal Wenner needs help hardening a position, drilling unreliable auxiliaries, or reading an approaching threat around Zootia floodplain circuits.

support_scope_notes: Integrated from the prior_release canon-ready named-NPC ledger append. Unsupported fields remain restrained. Appearance extended under V28_8 from role/locality/public-signal derivation rather than decorative fabrication.
public_signal: Weapon discipline, drilled stillness, and practiced readiness mark Hal Wenner as someone tied to organized force rather than casual violence.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Zootia floodplain circuits: drill yards, fortifications, command posts, or exposed routes
